title: STRLEN
description: Returns the length of a string value.

sections.title: Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility

content:
Returns the length of the string value stored at `key`. An error is returned when `key` holds a non-string value. ## Examples SET mykey "Hello world" STRLEN mykey STRLEN nonexisting ## Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility | Redis
Software | Redis
Cloud | Notes | |:----------------------|:-----------------|:------| | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | | ## Return information **RESP2:** [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): the length of the string stored at key, or 0 when the key does not exist. **RESP3:** [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): the length of the string stored at key, or 0 when the key does not exist.
intro:
Returns the length of the string value stored at `key`.
An error is returned when `key` holds a non-string value.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content:
Returns the length of the string value stored at `key`.
An error is returned when `key` holds a non-string value.

sections.title: Examples
sections.content:
SET mykey "Hello world"
STRLEN mykey
STRLEN nonexisting

sections.title: Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility
sections.content:
| Redis
Software | Redis
Cloud | Notes | |:----------------------|:-----------------|:------| | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | ✅ Standard

sections.title: Return information
sections.content:
**RESP2:**

[Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): the length of the string stored at key, or 0 when the key does not exist.

**RESP3:**

[Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): the length of the string stored at key, or 0 when the key does not exist.
